introduction: This presentation will explore our customers' views on our commitment to FSMA 204 compliance. We'll also assess our progress and identify areas for improvement.

subsections.heading: Understanding FSMA 204: An Overview
subsections.content:
• FSMA 204 is a federal law enacted in 2011 to ensure food safety
• It shifts the focus of federal regulators from responding to contamination to preventing it
• This legislation is applicable to all companies that manufacture, process, pack, or hold food
• It mandates companies to have a written preventive controls plan
• This plan should outline how the company will prevent food safety hazards
• It should also include a plan for correcting any problems that could arise
• The law also includes mandatory inspections by the FDA
subsections.justification: This slide provides general information about FSMA 204, but does not address customer perceptions or Lee's Market's specific compliance initiatives.

subsections.heading: Lee's Market Current Compliance Initiatives
subsections.content:
• Lee's Market has a dedicated FSMA 204 compliance team
• The team is responsible for developing and implementing our preventive controls plan
• We conduct regular internal audits to ensure compliance with FSMA 204
• Our training programs educate employees about food safety regulations
• We maintain thorough records as required by FSMA 204
• Our suppliers are also subject to our strict compliance requirements
• We communicate openly with regulatory authorities about our compliance efforts
subsections.justification: This slide discusses Lee's Market's compliance efforts, but does not provide any data on customer perceptions.

subsections.heading: Customer Perceptions on FSMA 204 Compliance
subsections.content:
• Customers increasingly prioritize food safety when choosing where to shop
• Many customers are aware of FSMA 204 and its implications
• Food safety scandals can significantly impact customer trust and brand reputation
• Transparency about compliance efforts can positively influence customer perceptions
• Customers appreciate when companies take proactive steps to ensure food safety
• Social media and online reviews provide platforms for customers to share their opinions on food safety practices
subsections.justification: This slide discusses general customer perceptions about food safety and FSMA 204, but does not provide specific data about Lee's Market's customer perceptions.

conclusion: Our customers are largely aware of our progress towards FSMA 204 compliance. Moving forward, we'll need to enhance our communication strategies to better express our commitment to compliance and food safety.
